prompts.name: landis_planner_soil_constraints_brief
prompts.title: LandIS: Planner Soil Constraints Brief
prompts.description: Summarize generalized soil constraints and caveats for a planning area.
prompts.question: Given an area geometry, summarize the dominant Soilscapes classes, key soil constraints, and the caveats that a planning officer should carry into an evidence pack.

prompts.name: landis_water_utility_pipe_risk_brief
prompts.title: LandIS: Water Utility Pipe Risk Brief
prompts.description: Screen corrosion and shrink-swell risk for a water utility area of interest.
prompts.question: Given an area geometry, produce a corrosion and shrink-swell pipe risk screening summary, explain the drivers, and include a verification checklist before trenching or asset intervention.

prompts.name: landis_catchment_soil_behaviour_brief
prompts.title: LandIS: Catchment Soil Behaviour Brief
prompts.description: Summarize generalized soil behaviour and caveats for catchment-style screening.
prompts.question: Given an area geometry, summarize the dominant Soilscapes classes, likely generalized soil behaviour patterns, and the caveats that a catchment manager should keep in view.
